name: tween
description: Tween is a small library for creating tweening animations in TypeScript. It allows you to smoothly animate an object's properties from one value to another over a specified duration using easing functions.

scripts.build: bun run bun-build.ts && npx tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --declarationMap false --sourceMap false
scripts.build:dist: bun run build && bun run build:docs

author: https://github.com/doubleactii
